scripts.qa-fix: npm run format; npm run lint
scripts.build:sdk-ecalli-mocks: cd sdk-ecalli-mocks && npm install && npm run build
scripts.sdk:test: cd sdk && npm install && npm test
scripts.example:build: npm run example:fib:build && npm run example:ecalli:build
scripts.example:test: npm run example:fib:test && npm run example:ecalli:test
scripts.example:ecalli:build: cd examples/ecalli-test && npm install && npm run build
scripts.example:ecalli:test: cd examples/ecalli-test && npm install && npm test
scripts.example:fib:build: cd examples/fibonacci && npm install && npm run build
scripts.example:fib:test: cd examples/fibonacci && npm install && npm test
scripts.build: npm run build:sdk-ecalli-mocks && npm run example:build
scripts.test: npm run build:sdk-ecalli-mocks && npm run sdk:test && npm run example:test
